commit_scope: Add a Mac + Android native core-axiom receipt binary pair and Form receipt floor.

commands: coord join && coord share "android-core-axiom-binary-receipt: expanding scope slightly per user to Mac+Android native receipt pair over explicit adb-forward TCP channel; still avoiding sensor/privacy/mesh/BML compiler lanes."
local_validation.notes: An authorized Samsung SM-S918U1 Android 16 arm64-v8a device was available through adb. The first adb-reverse attempt exposed a channel direction bug and was retuned to adb-forward TCP. The final expanded run generated a Mach-O 64-bit executable arm64 Mac binary and an ELF 64-bit ARM aarch64 Android PIE executable from a shared C source, pushed the Android binary to /data/local/tmp, ran it as a one-shot Android server, connected with the Mac client through adb-forward TCP, and wrote a combined receipt. The receipt status was pass with endpoint_count=2, samples_per_endpoint=2048, width=8, mac passed=2048 failed=0 checksum=8613732184965110171, android passed=2048 failed=0 checksum=8613732184965110171, peer_valid=true. Focused Form validation returned 4095 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent. fourth-arm-gate returned PASS-4WAY core-axiom-native-receipt.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy requested; this is a local Mac + authorized Android native carrier proof.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The body now has a bounded Mac+Android native binary receipt floor: both endpoints verify the same sample window and exchange the receipt over an explicit native TCP channel carried by adb-forward.
public_endpoints: n/a: local authorized Android adb device and local Mac native binary
test_flows: Build macOS arm64 and Android arm64 binaries from one C source.
Push the Android executable to /data/local/tmp and run it one-shot.
Connect Mac client to Android server over adb-forward TCP.
Require both endpoint receipts to pass the same bounded sample window with matching checksum.
Validate the combined Form receipt shape four-way through fkwu.

phase_gate.gate: A native Mac+Android binary receipt pair must exist before claiming self-learning or left-expanding behavior across the phone and Mac.
phase_gate.next: Convert the one-shot adb-forward receipt into a signed install/package receipt with checksums, source-map provenance, channel RTT/timeout rows, larger sample windows, and then a non-adb mesh transport receipt.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Android could execute the Form-native ELF proof through adb, and the model lane had a native host tensor-autodiff verifier, but no two-endpoint Mac+Android native receipt pair existed.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: core-axiom-native-receipt returns 4095 four-way for receipt validation, and generated macOS arm64 + Android arm64 native binaries exchanged a pass receipt over adb-forward TCP for 2048 width-8 affine-loss samples.
